concerns.text: SC-002 states 'sufficient observations per dataset' without a measurable threshold. data-model.md specifies minItems: 1000; spec should explicitly state '≥1000 observations' to enable unambiguous verification per T173.
SC-006 states 'config.yaml < minimal size' but does not define 'minimal'. FR-009 and constitution specify 2KB limit; this must be explicitly stated as '<2048 bytes' to be measurable.

Spec lists 8 schema files but plan.md references 9 (including streaming_dpgmm.schema.yaml). The streaming_dpgmm contract is missing from schema definitions, creating untestable gap in contract coverage.
SC-001 'Univariate time series only' lacks operational definition. Should specify 'all series have exactly one numeric value column' to enable deterministic verification.
